plugins.name: ai
plugins.description: Skills for building with LLMs and designing for agents — prompt architecture, agent interface design (UI/UX/CLI/tools), multi-agent orchestration, LLM output quality, and agentic testing.

plugins.name: spec-driven-development
plugins.description: Skills for spec-driven development — write specs, then review specs/designs/plans/requirements against each other.

plugins.name: claude-authoring
plugins.description: Guides for authoring Claude Code artifacts — CLAUDE.md files, hooks, rules, skills, commands, and scripts.

plugins.name: knowledge-capture
plugins.description: Skills for capturing knowledge through interviews, peer collaboration, breakthrough thinking, and session takeaways.

plugins.name: web
plugins.description: Skills for web development workflows — frontend product design and UX consultancy.

plugins.name: development
plugins.description: Core software-development skills and agents — systematic debugging and runtime verification, plus a full delegation set: explore (read-only scout), planner, programmer, reviewer, and a read-only senior-advisor.

plugins.name: design-discovery
plugins.description: Socratic, crtr human-led design-discovery interviews — grill the user in question waves to shape the ideal product experience and to extract and pressure-test the technical design before building.
